selectColumns.ColumnQuery: CASE WHEN YEAR(to_date(START_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')) > YEAR(current_date()) AND to_date(END_DATE,'yyyyMMdd') is null THEN to_date(last_day(add_months(date_trunc('yyyy', to_date(START_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')),11)),'yyyyMMdd') WHEN to_date(END_DATE,'yyyyMMdd') is null THEN to_date(last_day(add_months(date_trunc('yyyy', current_date()),11)),'yyyyMMdd') WHEN YEAR(to_date(START_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')) > YEAR(current_date()) AND YEAR(to_date(END_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')) > YEAR(to_date(START_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')) THEN to_date(last_day(add_months(date_trunc('yyyy', to_date(START_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')),11)),'yyyyMMdd') WHEN YEAR(to_date(START_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')) <= YEAR(current_date()) AND YEAR(to_date(END_DATE,'yyyyMMdd')) > YEAR(current_date()) THEN to_date(last_day(add_months(date_trunc('yyyy', current_date()),11)),'yyyyMMdd') ELSE to_date(END_DATE,'yyyyMMdd') END
